title: Better Buy: Take-Two Interactive vs. Electronic Arts
text: Take-Two isn't currently profitable but could see fantastic growth next year. EA will appeal more to risk-averse investors.

title: 25 S&P 500 Stocks to Target Next Month
text: Subscribers to  Chart of the Week  received this commentary on Sunday, July 23.

title: 2 Gaming Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: Electronic Arts has strong cash flow and pays a dividend. Take-Two Interactive Software is trading far from its highs, and its best days could be here soon.

title: Take-Two Interactive Stock: Bear vs. Bull
text: The video-game maker isn't generating sustainable profits yet. Plus, the stock's valuation has jumped to nearly 5 times sales.

title: Are Investors Ignoring Take-Two Interactive's Biggest Risk?
text: Wall Street is excited about a flood of new game releases on the way. Investors will have to be patient and wade through a lackluster fiscal 2024 before those major titles arrive.

title: A Bull Market Is Coming: 1 Massive Reason to Buy This Growth Stock in the Second Half of 2023
text: Take-Two Interactive is one of the strongest and most influential companies in the gaming industry. "Grand Theft Auto V" was an incredible success for the company, and a sequel is in the works.

title: These 13 S&P 500 stocks stand out for expected growth through 2025
text: As the 2023 stock-market rally continues, this is a good time to look further ahead to see which companies are expected to show the highest growth rates through 2025.

title: A Bull Market Is Coming: 2 Growth Stocks Down 15% and 30% to Buy Right Now
text: Top semiconductor equipment companies stand out as a smart way to play tech trends. There are still some overlooked opportunities in the gaming industry.

title: Why Take-Two (TTWO) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Take-Two (TTWO) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: 2 Reasons to Buy Take-Two Interactive Stock, and 1 Reason to Avoid It
text: Take-Two Interactive's portfolio is much improved compared to the pre-pandemic days. Net losses are a caution sign on this stock.

title: Take-Two Interactive Stock: Don't Jump the Gun On the Current Rally
text: Take-Two Interactive has games in the pipeline, but official release dates remain scarce. The purchase of Zynga offers a major new opportunity for the company.

title: 2 Growth Stocks Up 38% to 49% in 2023 With Room to Run
text: This leading video game maker is set to expand its game lineup and deliver record financial results in the next five years. Netflix could see accelerating revenue growth and higher margins from its paid sharing initiative.

title: These 2 Stocks Get a Boost After Microsoft's Activision Win. More Videogame Deals Lie Ahead.
text: A federal judge's ruling that Microsoft can close on its $75 billion acquisition of Activision Blizzard could unlock further deals in the videogame sector.

title: Better Buy: Take-Two Interactive vs. Electronic Arts Stock
text: Both developers have huge content portfolios. Take-Two isn't profitable today but is targeting much faster growth in the next few years.

title: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. to Report First Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Results on Tuesday, August 8, 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO) today announced that it plans to report financial results for the first quarter of its fiscal year 2024, ended June 30, 2023, after the market close on Tuesday, August 8, 2023. The Company plans to hold a conference call to discuss its results at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, which can be accessed by dialing (877) 407-0984 or (201) 689-8577. A live, listen-only webcast and a replay of the call will be available at http://ta.

title: Why Take-Two Interactive Stock Jumped 41% In the First Half of 2023
text: Take-Two's valuation has gone up recently because investors are excited about the company's pipeline of future video games. Management expects modest growth and steep losses over the next year, which should give investors pause.
